_readme: Curated REAL-CARD behavior scripts for cards whose test fixture lives under a different name (or that need no fixture). deck:triage merges these over fixture-derived scripts when emitting the copy-paste Scripts section. Keys are exact card names (case-insensitive match). Grows deck by deck.

modes.label: Exile top two; play until end of your next turn
Create a token copy of target permanent (a 4/4 with flying)
Draw cards equal to the greatest mana value among permanents you control
Destroy target artifact that opponent controls
Deal 4 damage to each other opponent
Exile the top card of your library; you may play it
Draw cards equal to the greatest power among non-Human creatures you control
Non-Human creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn
Breya deals 3 damage to target player
Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn

loyalty_abilities.label: Discard up to two cards, then draw that many
Sacrifice an artifact, return one from your graveyard

modes.label: Plus one counter on target creature
Return a card from a graveyard to hand
Tap all creatures target player controls
Put a land from your hand onto the battlefield tapped
Return a land from your graveyard tapped

effects.prompt: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle?

modes.label: Return target nonland permanent to hand
Create a token copy of target creature you control

loyalty_abilities.label: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn
You may sacrifice a Vampire; if you do, Sorin deals 3 damage to each opponent and you gain 3 life

effects.prompt: Sacrifice a Vampire to deal 3 and gain 3?

loyalty_abilities.label: You may put a Vampire creature card from your hand onto the battlefield

effects.prompt: Put a Vampire creature from your hand onto the battlefield?

modes.label: Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.

activated_abilities.label: Sacrifice a Treasure: exile the top card, play it this turn

effects.prompt: Sacrifice a Zombie to draw a card?

activated_abilities.label: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield

effects.prompt: Exploit — sacrifice a creature? If you do, search your library for a card and put it into your hand.

modes.label: Put three +1/+1 counters on this creature
Create three 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature tokens
All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn
Regenerate each creature you control (indestructible until end of turn)

effects.prompt: Put an Angel, Demon, or Dragon creature card from your hand onto the battlefield

activated_abilities.label: Elves get +3/+3 and trample until end of turn
Create a 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature token
Elves you control get +2/+2 and gain deathtouch until end of turn
Search your library for a card named Elvish Clancaller, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle

effects.prompt: Pay {1} to put a +1/+1 counter on Wildborn Preserver

modes.label: Exile target card from a graveyard

activated_abilities.label: Put a charge counter on Coalition Relic

effects.prompt: Choose a color — add one mana of that color for each charge counter removed

modes.label: Rip Apart deals 3 damage to target creature.
Target player sacrifices an artifact of their choice
Target player sacrifices a creature of their choice
Target player sacrifices a planeswalker of their choice

actions.prompt: Addendum — did you cast this during your main phase? If so, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control and they gain vigilance.

modes.label: Return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand
Return two Zombie cards from your graveyard to your hand

effects.prompt: Create a 1/1 black deathtouch Snake? (Only if you control no Snakes)
Roll a d20 and pick the result
